mapper.select: SELECT login_id,name,sex,addr1,addr2,phone,grade FROM member WHERE isadmin!='Y' ORDER BY regdate DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT member_id,name,sex,addr1,addr2,email,phone,dbday FROM ( SELECT member_id,name,sex,addr1,addr2,email,phone,TO_CHAR(regdate,'yyyy-mm-dd') AS dbday FROM member ORDER BY regdate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <=10

SELECT d.reserve_detail_id, d.reserve_id, r.member_id, r.total_amount, s.schedule_id, t1.team_name home, t2.team_name away, t1.emblem home_em, t2.emblem away_em, TO_CHAR(s.game_date,'yyyy-mm-dd') gday, s.game_time, d.grade_name, d.seat_row, d.seat_col, TO_CHAR(r.reserve_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') rday FROM reservation_detail d JOIN reservation r ON d.reserve_id=r.reserve_id JOIN kleague_schedule s ON r.schedule_id=s.schedule_id
JOIN kleague_team t1 ON s.home_team_id=t1.team_id
JOIN kleague_team t2 ON s.away_team_id=t2.team_id
ORDER BY r.reserve_id DESC
OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE match_seat SET seat_status='Y' WHERE match_seat_id=#{match_seat_id}
